name: Flag ICs (ICLabel)
description: Flag independent components as artifacts based on ICLabel classification probabilities. Flagged components are marked for rejection in EEG.reject.gcompreject.

inputs.name: Brain
inputs.description: Probability range to flag as Brain [min max]. Components in this range will be FLAGGED. Usually you want to flag components with LOW brain probability, e.g. [0 0.2]

inputs.name: Muscle
inputs.description: Probability range to flag as Muscle artifact [min max]. Default: [0.9 1]

inputs.name: Eye
inputs.description: Probability range to flag as Eye artifact [min max]. Default: [0.9 1]

inputs.name: Heart
inputs.description: Probability range to flag as Heart artifact [min max].

inputs.name: Line_Noise
inputs.description: Probability range to flag as Line Noise artifact [min max].

inputs.name: Channel_Noise
inputs.description: Probability range to flag as Channel Noise artifact [min max].

inputs.name: Other
inputs.description: Probability range to flag as Other artifact [min max].

outputs.name: EEG
outputs.description: Output EEG structure with components flagged for rejection
